meta.title: Global Logistics Empire — Build a Worldwide Transport Empire
meta.description: Global Logistics Empire is a deep tycoon and logistics simulation. Manage trucks, trains, ships, and planes, hire staff, research technologies, build infrastructure, and grow from a single garage to a global empire.
toc.title: Page Contents
hero.lead: Build your global freight empire — from a single van in a small garage to a worldwide carrier with trucks, trains, container ships, and planes on every continent. Hire staff, research technologies, build depots, and turn your routes into a profit machine.
hero.info_desc: For players who love tycoon games, transport, optimization, and long-term company growth.
about.title: About Me
about.lead: Hi — I’m the developer behind Global Logistics Empire. A few honest words about what this project really is:
about.li1: I’m an amateur developer — this is a passion project, not a big studio production.
about.li2: The game is still in development and I’m constantly adding new content.
about.li3: Development is slower since I work on it in my free time alongside regular life.
about.li4: The goal is to gradually improve the game and make it better together with players.
numbers.title: Game Stats
numbers.desc: A huge amount of content to plan, upgrade, unlock, and master.
fleet.title: Four Transport Types, One Global Fleet
fleet.desc: Each type has its own physics, fuel logic, capacity, and route network.
fleet.road_desc: Vans, trucks, refrigerated trucks, tankers, armored vehicles
fleet.rail_desc: Freight, container, bulk, and express trains
fleet.sea_desc: Coastal ships, cargo ships, container ships, tankers, refrigerated ships
fleet.air_desc: Small, medium, and large cargo planes and jets
features.title: Key Game Features
features.desc: Deep simulation systems in a clear mobile UI.
features.contracts_desc: Contracts are generated by reputation, slots, and fleet capabilities. 70% are based on your depot for reasonable routing.
features.contracts_li1: Feasibility checks by cargo, mode, and tags
features.contracts_li3: Daily challenges and time-limited special jobs
features.map_desc: An interactive world built on Leaflet with dark CARTO tiles, custom Dijkstra routing, and real-time animated vehicles.
features.economy_desc: Manage cash, loans, fuel, AdBlue, electricity, vehicle wear, wages, ad bonuses, and global events affecting prices.
upgrades.title: Vehicle Customization & Upgrades
upgrades.desc: Each vehicle is a unique asset — name it, paint it, upgrade it, add trailers, and keep it running.
upgrades.lv33_desc: Improve speed, capacity, efficiency, and special abilities. Price multipliers differ by transport type.
upgrades.lv33_li1: Capability tags unlock special contracts (refrigerated, ADR, oversized, etc.)
upgrades.lv33_li2: Accessories by mode: trailers, wagons, containers
upgrades.lv33_li3: Energy variants — 2nd model in road/rail groups is fully electric
upgrades.wear_desc: Vehicles wear down as they’re used. Managers can auto-repair below 30% and ad rewards help free players keep their fleet in shape.
upgrades.wear_li1: 22 SVG shapes, color-coded by transport type
upgrades.wear_li2: Custom names and emoji prefixes for ID
upgrades.wear_li3: Strict identity via instanceId — no ghost vehicles
staff.title: Staff, Managers & Dispatcher
staff.desc: You can’t run a global empire alone — hire specialists and let them automate the boring stuff.
staff.spec_desc: Dispatching a vehicle depends on specialized staff — you need the right people for trucks, trains, ships, or planes.
staff.mgr_desc: Hire managers and upgrade their skills — all buffs are calculated centrally, so bonus stacking works correctly.
staff.mgr_li1: Bonuses to payouts, faster contracts, cheaper repairs
staff.disp_desc: The dispatcher is a premium automation staff member who manages your contract board and picks the most profitable jobs your fleet can handle.
staff.disp_li1: Free players: 3 vehicles per bulk click
staff.disp_li2: Premium: 10 per click, up to 54h auto-dispatch
research.title: Research & Infrastructure
research.desc: Unlock advanced features via research, then physically build your operations.
research.tree_desc: Research is needed to unlock bulk dispatch, auto features, premium contract generator, and advanced logistics tools.
research.tree_li3: Premium contract generator with nested % controls
research.build_desc: Build and upgrade depots, garages, workshops, fuel stations, warehouses, and logistics hubs. Every building provides flat and percentage bonuses.
research.build_li1: Bigger fleet capacity and more contract slots
research.build_li2: Cheaper fuel, faster repairs, better payouts
meta_systems.title: Progression, Rewards & Live Ops
meta_systems.desc: Long-term goals to keep your empire growing for hundreds of hours.
meta_systems.ach_desc: Tiered milestones with scaling rewards, claim-on-click design, and cosmetic unlocks.
meta_systems.badges_desc: Cosmetic progression — show off your status with collectible badges and player titles.
meta_systems.daily_desc: Streaks reset at UTC, daily challenges with guaranteed 2 gem reward and double rewards for Premium.
meta_systems.events_desc: Dynamic real-time modifiers (war, fuel crisis, holiday booms…) reshape the economy on the fly.
meta_systems.res_desc: Diesel, electricity, and AdBlue consumption with dedicated upgrades and storage.
meta_systems.gems_desc: Premium currency for instant finishes, unlocks, dispatcher boosts, and cosmetic perks.
meta_systems.prem_desc: +10% payouts, ad-free gameplay, free contract rejection, and up to 54h auto-dispatch.
meta_systems.cloud_desc: Google Cloud sync across devices with strict conflict detection — never lose progress.
trip.title: How Deliveries Actually Work
trip.desc: Simulation engine ticks every 5 in-game minutes and supports 1×–8× speed.
trip.s1_desc: Pick a contract from the board (manually or via Dispatcher). Feasibility is checked against your fleet.
trip.s2_desc: Assigned vehicle drives from its current location to the pickup city — consuming fuel along the way.
trip.s3_desc: Fixed 0.5h loading phase, then cargo travels the route network in real time.
trip.s4_desc: Payment, reputation (+0.4 base), wear, staff fatigue, and offline catch-up are processed.
tech.title: Built for Mobile, Ready for the World
tech.desc: Native Android via Capacitor with PWA fallback and full localization.
tech.mobile_desc: Safe-area, 100dvh layouts, double-tap zoom disabled, native AdMob banner sizing, and gesture-friendly map.
tech.langs_desc: EN, CS, DE, FR, ES, IT, NL, PL, HU, RO, UA, RU, PT-BR, TR, ID, AR, SV, NO, DA, FI, JA, KO, HI, PK — with safe placeholder interpolation.
tech.save_desc: Base64-obfuscated saves with FNV-1a hash, tamper detection, 3 manual slots + 1 autosave, and forced save on every purchase.
roadmap.title: Future Plans
roadmap.desc: What’s planned next. Currently focusing on graphics (better vehicle images and in-game visuals).
roadmap.note: Currently in progress: improved vehicle graphics.
roadmap.f1_desc: Enhanced images for vehicles, buildings, and UI elements.
roadmap.f2_desc: Engine sounds, ambient effects, and UI feedback.
roadmap.f3_desc: Compete with players worldwide in revenue, fleet size, and milestones.
roadmap.f4_desc: Multi-phase jobs chaining road, rail, sea, and air for bigger payouts.
roadmap.f5_desc: Improved geography, road network, and regional detail.
roadmap.f6_desc: Play with friends and build a shared logistics empire.
feedback.title: Suggestions & Feedback
feedback.desc: Let me know what you’d like to see in the game. Every idea helps shape the roadmap.
feedback.msg_ph: What would you like to see in the game?
feedback.sent: Thanks! Your email client should now open with your message ready to send.
cta.title: Made for Tycoon Players
cta.desc: If you enjoy route planning, optimizing efficiency, and watching your company grow, this game is for you.
footer.title: Global Logistics Empire
footer.text: Official project website hosted on GitHub Pages.
